text: {"Unnamed: 1": "THE ULTIMATE ISO 27001 TOOLKIT"} {"Unnamed: 1": "VIEW THE ULTIMATE ISO 27001 TOOLKIT >>"}

{"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "ISO 27001 Annex A Control Number", "Unnamed: 2": "Title", "Unnamed: 3": "Control Objective"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5", "Unnamed: 2": "Organisational Controls"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.1", "Unnamed: 2": "Policies for information security", "Unnamed: 3": "Information security policy and topic-specific policies should be defined, approved by management,
published, communicated to and acknowledged by relevant personnel and relevant interested parties,
and reviewed at planned intervals and if significant changes occur."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.2", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security roles and responsibilities", "Unnamed: 3": "Information security roles and responsibilities should be defined and allocated according to the
organization needs"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.3", "Unnamed: 2": "Segregation of duties", "Unnamed: 3": "Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility should be segregated."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.4", "Unnamed: 2": "Management Responsibilities", "Unnamed: 3": "Management should require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with the
established information security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures of the organization."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.5", "Unnamed: 2": "Contact with Authorities", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should establish and maintain contact with relevant authorities."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.6", "Unnamed: 2": "Contact with special interest groups", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should establish and maintain contact with special interest groups or other specialist
security forums and professional associations."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.7", "Unnamed: 2": "Threat intelligence", "Unnamed: 3": "Information relating to information security threats should be collected and analysed to produce threat
intelligence."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.8", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security in project management", "Unnamed: 3": "Information security should be integrated into project management."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.9", "Unnamed: 2": "Inventory of information and other associated assets", "Unnamed: 3": "An inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners, should be developed and
maintained."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.10", "Unnamed: 2": "Acceptable use of information and other associated assets", "Unnamed: 3": "Rules for the acceptable use and procedures for handling information and other associated assets
should be identified, documented and implemented."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.11", "Unnamed: 2": "Return of Assets", "Unnamed: 3": "Personnel and other interested parties as appropriate should return all the organization’s assets in
their possession upon change or termination of their employment, contract or agreement."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.12", "Unnamed: 2": "Classification Of Information", "Unnamed: 3": "Information should be classified according to the information security needs of the organization based
on confidentiality, integrity, availability and relevant interested party requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.13", "Unnamed: 2": "Labelling of Information", "Unnamed: 3": "An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling should be developed and implemented in
accordance with the information classification scheme adopted by the organization."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.14", "Unnamed: 2": "Information Transfer", "Unnamed: 3": "Information transfer rules, procedures, or agreements should be in place for all types of transfer
facilities within the organization and between the organization and other parties."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.15", "Unnamed: 2": "Access Control", "Unnamed: 3": "Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets should be
established and implemented based on business and information security requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.16", "Unnamed: 2": "Identity Management", "Unnamed: 3": "The full life cycle of identities should be managed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.17", "Unnamed: 2": "Authentication information", "Unnamed: 3": "Allocation and management of authentication information should be controlled by a management
process, including advising personnel on the appropriate handling of authentication information."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.18", "Unnamed: 2": "Access rights", "Unnamed: 3": "Access rights to information and other associated assets should be provisioned, reviewed, modified
and removed in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on and rules for access control."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.19", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security in supplier relationships", "Unnamed: 3": "Processes and procedures should be defined and implemented to manage the information security
risks associated with the use of supplier’s products or services."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.20", "Unnamed: 2": "Addressing information security within supplier agreements", "Unnamed: 3": "Relevant information security requirements should be established and agreed with each supplier based
on the type

rights", "Unnamed: 3": "Access rights to information and other associated assets should be provisioned, reviewed, modified
and removed in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on and rules for access control."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.19", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security in supplier relationships", "Unnamed: 3": "Processes and procedures should be defined and implemented to manage the information security
risks associated with the use of supplier’s products or services."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.20", "Unnamed: 2": "Addressing information security within supplier agreements", "Unnamed: 3": "Relevant information security requirements should be established and agreed with each supplier based
on the type of supplier relationship."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.21", "Unnamed: 2": "Managing information security in the ICT supply chain", "Unnamed: 3": "Processes and procedures should be defined and implemented to manage the information security
risks associated with the ICT products and services supply chain."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.22", "Unnamed: 2": "Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should regularly monitor, review, evaluate and manage change in supplier information
security practices and service delivery."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.23", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security for use of cloud services", "Unnamed: 3": "Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services should be established in
accordance with the organization’s information security requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.24", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security incident management planning and preparation", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should plan and prepare for managing information security incidents by defining,
establishing and communicating information security incident management processes, roles and
responsibilities"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.25", "Unnamed: 2": "Assessment and decision on information security events", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should assess information security events and decide if they are to be categorized as
information security incidents."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.26", "Unnamed: 2": "Response to information security incidents", "Unnamed: 3": "Information security incidents should be responded to in accordance with the documented procedures."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.27", "Unnamed: 2": "Learning from information security incidents", "Unnamed: 3": "Knowledge gained from information security incidents should be used to strengthen and improve the
information security controls."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.28", "Unnamed: 2": "Collection of evidence", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should establish and implement procedures for the identification, collection,
acquisition and preservation of evidence related to information security events."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.29", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security during disruption", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should plan how to maintain information security at an appropriate level during
disruption."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.30", "Unnamed: 2": "ICT readiness for business continuity", "Unnamed: 3": "ICT readiness should be planned, implemented, maintained and tested based on business continuity
objectives and ICT continuity requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.31", "Unnamed: 2": "Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements", "Unnamed: 3": "Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the
organization’s approach to meet these requirements should be identified, documented and kept up to
date."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.32", "Unnamed: 2": "Intellectual property rights", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should implement appropriate procedures to protect intellectual property rights."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.33", "Unnamed: 2": "Protection of records", "Unnamed: 3": "Records should be protected from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access and unauthorized
release."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.34", "Unnamed: 2": "Privacy and protection of PII", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should identify and meet the requirements regarding the preservation of privacy and
protection of PII according to applicable laws and regulations and contractual requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.35", "Unnamed: 2": "Independent review of information security", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization’s approach to managing information security and its implementation including people,
processes and technologies should be reviewed independently at planned intervals, or when significant
changes occur."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.36", "Unnamed: 2": "Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security", "Unnamed: 3": "Compliance with the organization’s information security policy, topic-specific policies, rules and
standards should be regularly reviewed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.37", "Unnamed: 2": "Documented operating procedures", "Unnamed: 3": "Operating procedures for information processing facilities should be documented and made available
to personnel who need them."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6", "Unnamed: 2":

3": "The organization’s approach to managing information security and its implementation including people,
processes and technologies should be reviewed independently at planned intervals, or when significant
changes occur."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.36", "Unnamed: 2": "Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security", "Unnamed: 3": "Compliance with the organization’s information security policy, topic-specific policies, rules and
standards should be regularly reviewed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "5.37", "Unnamed: 2": "Documented operating procedures", "Unnamed: 3": "Operating procedures for information processing facilities should be documented and made available
to personnel who need them."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6", "Unnamed: 2": "People Controls"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.1", "Unnamed: 2": "Screening", "Unnamed: 3": "Background verification checks on all candidates to become personnel should be carried out prior to
joining the organization and on an ongoing basis taking into consideration applicable laws, regulations
and ethics and be proportional to the business requirements, the classification of the information to be
accessed and the perceived risks."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.2", "Unnamed: 2": "Terms and conditions of employment", "Unnamed: 3": "The employment contractual agreements should state the personnel’s and the organization’s
responsibilities for information security."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.3", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security awareness, education and training", "Unnamed: 3": "Personnel of the organization and relevant interested parties should receive appropriate information
security awareness, education and training and regular updates of the organization's information
security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures, as relevant for their job function."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.4", "Unnamed: 2": "Disciplinary process", "Unnamed: 3": "A disciplinary process should be formalized and communicated to take actions against personnel and
other relevant interested parties who have committed an information security policy violation."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.5", "Unnamed: 2": "Responsibilities after termination or change of employment", "Unnamed: 3": "Information security responsibilities and duties that remain valid after termination or change of
employment should be defined, enforced and communicated to relevant personnel and other interested
parties."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.6", "Unnamed: 2": "Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements", "Unnamed: 3": "Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements reflecting the organization’s needs for the protection of
information should be identified, documented, regularly reviewed and signed by personnel and other
relevant interested parties."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.7", "Unnamed: 2": "Remote working", "Unnamed: 3": "Security measures should be implemented when personnel are working remotely to protect information
accessed, processed or stored outside the organization’s premises."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "6.8", "Unnamed: 2": "Information security event reporting", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should provide a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected
information security events through appropriate channels in a timely manner."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7", "Unnamed: 2": "Physical Controls"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.1", "Unnamed: 2": "Physical security perimeters", "Unnamed: 3": "Security perimeters should be defined and used to protect areas that contain information and other
associated assets."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.2", "Unnamed: 2": "Physical entry", "Unnamed: 3": "Secure areas should be protected by appropriate entry controls and access points."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.3", "Unnamed: 2": "Securing offices, rooms and facilities", "Unnamed: 3": "Physical security for offices, rooms and facilities should be designed and implemented."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.4", "Unnamed: 2": "Physical security monitoring", "Unnamed: 3": "Premises should be continuously monitored for unauthorized physical access."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.5", "Unnamed: 2": "Protecting against physical and environmental threats", "Unnamed: 3": "Protection against physical and environmental threats, such as natural disasters and other intentional
or unintentional physical threats to infrastructure should be designed and implemented."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.6", "Unnamed: 2": "Working in secure areas", "Unnamed: 3": "Security measures for working in secure areas should be designed and implemented."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.7", "Unnamed: 2": "Clear desk and clear screen", "Unnamed: 3": "Clear desk rules for papers and removable storage media and clear screen rules for information
processing facilities should be defined and appropriately enforced."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.8", "Unnamed: 2": "Equipment siting and protection", "Unnamed: 3": "Equipment should be sited securely and protected."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.9", "Unnamed: 2": "Security of assets off-premises", "Unnamed: 3": "Off-site assets should be protected."} {"ISO 27001

"Working in secure areas", "Unnamed: 3": "Security measures for working in secure areas should be designed and implemented."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.7", "Unnamed: 2": "Clear desk and clear screen", "Unnamed: 3": "Clear desk rules for papers and removable storage media and clear screen rules for information
processing facilities should be defined and appropriately enforced."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.8", "Unnamed: 2": "Equipment siting and protection", "Unnamed: 3": "Equipment should be sited securely and protected."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.9", "Unnamed: 2": "Security of assets off-premises", "Unnamed: 3": "Off-site assets should be protected."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.10", "Unnamed: 2": "Storage media", "Unnamed: 3": "Storage media should be managed through their life cycle of acquisition, use, transportation and
disposal in accordance with the organization’s classification scheme and handling requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.11", "Unnamed: 2": "Supporting utilities", "Unnamed: 3": "Information processing facilities should be protected from power failures and other disruptions caused
by failures in supporting utilities."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.12", "Unnamed: 2": "Cabling security", "Unnamed: 3": "Cables carrying power, data or supporting information services should be protected from interception,
interference or damage."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.13", "Unnamed: 2": "Equipment maintenance", "Unnamed: 3": "Equipment should be maintained correctly to ensure availability, integrity and confidentiality of
information."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "7.14", "Unnamed: 2": "Secure disposal or re-use of equipment", "Unnamed: 3": "Items of equipment containing storage media should be verified to ensure that any sensitive data and
licensed software has been removed or securely overwritten prior to disposal or re-use."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8", "Unnamed: 2": "Technological Controls"} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.1", "Unnamed: 2": "User endpoint devices", "Unnamed: 3": "Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices should be protected."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.2", "Unnamed: 2": "Privileged access rights", "Unnamed: 3": "The allocation and use of privileged access rights should be restricted and managed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.3", "Unnamed: 2": "Information access restriction", "Unnamed: 3": "Access to information and other associated assets should be restricted in accordance with the
established topic-specific policy on access control."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.4", "Unnamed: 2": "Access to source code", "Unnamed: 3": "Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries should be appropriately
managed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.5", "Unnamed: 2": "Secure authentication", "Unnamed: 3": "Secure authentication technologies and procedures should be implemented based on information
access restrictions and the topic-specific policy on access control."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.6", "Unnamed: 2": "Capacity management", "Unnamed: 3": "The use of resources should be monitored and adjusted in line with current and expected capacity
requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.7", "Unnamed: 2": "Protection against malware", "Unnamed: 3": "Protection against malware should be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.8", "Unnamed: 2": "Management of technical vulnerabilities", "Unnamed: 3": "Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use should be obtained, the
organization’s exposure to such vulnerabilities should be evaluated and appropriate measures should
be taken."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.9", "Unnamed: 2": "Configuration management", "Unnamed: 3": "Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks should
be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.10", "Unnamed: 2": "Information deletion", "Unnamed: 3": "Information stored in information systems, devices or in any other storage media should be deleted
when no longer required."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.11", "Unnamed: 2": "Data masking", "Unnamed: 3": "Data masking should be used in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on access
control and other related topic-specific policies, and business requirements, taking applicable
legislation into consideration."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.12", "Unnamed: 2": "Data leakage prevention", "Unnamed: 3": "Data leakage prevention measures should be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that
process, store or transmit sensitive information."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.13", "Unnamed: 2": "Information backup", "Unnamed: 3": "Backup copies of information, software and systems should be maintained and regularly tested in
accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.14", "Unnamed: 2": "Redundancy of information processing

with the organization’s topic-specific policy on access
control and other related topic-specific policies, and business requirements, taking applicable
legislation into consideration."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.12", "Unnamed: 2": "Data leakage prevention", "Unnamed: 3": "Data leakage prevention measures should be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that
process, store or transmit sensitive information."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.13", "Unnamed: 2": "Information backup", "Unnamed: 3": "Backup copies of information, software and systems should be maintained and regularly tested in
accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.14", "Unnamed: 2": "Redundancy of information processing facilities", "Unnamed: 3": "Information processing facilities should be implemented with redundancy sufficient to meet availability
requirements."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.15", "Unnamed: 2": "Logging", "Unnamed: 3": "Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events should be produced, stored,
protected and analysed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.16", "Unnamed: 2": "Monitoring activities", "Unnamed: 3": "Networks, systems and applications should be monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate
actions taken to evaluate potential information security incidents."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.17", "Unnamed: 2": "Clock synchronization", "Unnamed: 3": "The clocks of information processing systems used by the organization should be synchronized to
approved time sources."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.18", "Unnamed: 2": "Use of privileged utility programs", "Unnamed: 3": "The use of utility programs that can be capable of overriding system and application controls should be
restricted and tightly controlled."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.19", "Unnamed: 2": "Installation of software on operational
systems", "Unnamed: 3": "Procedures and measures should be implemented to securely manage software installation on
operational systems."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.20", "Unnamed: 2": "Networks security", "Unnamed: 3": "Networks and network devices should be secured, managed and controlled to protect information in
systems and applications."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.21", "Unnamed: 2": "Security of network services", "Unnamed: 3": "Security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services should be identified,
implemented and monitored."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.22", "Unnamed: 2": "Segregation of networks", "Unnamed: 3": "Groups of information services, users and information systems should be segregated in the
organization’s networks."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.23", "Unnamed: 2": "Web filtering", "Unnamed: 3": "Access to external websites should be managed to reduce exposure to malicious content."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.24", "Unnamed: 2": "Use of cryptography", "Unnamed: 3": "Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, should be defined
and implemented."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.25", "Unnamed: 2": "Secure development life cycle", "Unnamed: 3": "Rules for the secure development of software and systems should be established and applied."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.26", "Unnamed: 2": "Application security requirements", "Unnamed: 3": "Information security requirements should be identified, specified and approved when developing or
acquiring applications."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.27", "Unnamed: 2": "Secure system architecture and
engineering principles", "Unnamed: 3": "Principles for engineering secure systems should be established, documented, maintained and applied
to any information system development activities."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.28", "Unnamed: 2": "Secure coding", "Unnamed: 3": "Secure coding principles should be applied to software development."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.29", "Unnamed: 2": "Security testing in development and acceptance", "Unnamed: 3": "Security testing processes should be defined and implemented in the development life cycle."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.30", "Unnamed: 2": "Outsourced development", "Unnamed: 3": "The organization should direct, monitor and review the activities related to outsourced system
development."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.31", "Unnamed: 2": "Separation of development, test and production environments", "Unnamed: 3": "Development, testing and production environments should be separated and secured."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.32", "Unnamed: 2": "Change management", "Unnamed: 3": "Changes to information processing facilities and information systems should be subject to change
management procedures."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.33", "Unnamed: 2": "Test information", "Unnamed: 3": "Test information should be appropriately selected, protected and managed."} {"ISO 27001 Annex A Controls List": "8.34", "Unnamed: 2": "Protection of information
systems during audit testing", "Unnamed: 3": "Audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems should be
planned and agreed between the tester and appropriate management."}
